raw_data.details: The “Rani Laxmi Bai Self-Defense Training” is a scheme under the Samagra Shiksha Programme, implemented by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide free self-defense skills training (including judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) to girl students in upper primary and secondary schools across the state.
raw_data.benefits: Free self-defense techniques training is provided to girl students.
raw_data.eligibility: The applicant (girl student) must be studying in an upper primary or secondary government school in Uttarakhand.
raw_data.application_process: OfflineSelf-defense skills training (judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) is provided to female students in upper primary and secondary schools across the state. All girls in each selected school are included in the training.
raw_data.documents_required: Documents as required by the concerned school.

To know more please visit Check EligibilityRani Laxmi Bai Self-Defense TrainingUttarakhandRani Laxmi Bai Self-Defense TrainingGirl StudentSamagra ShikshaSelf Defense TrainingCheck EligibilityDetailsThe “Rani Laxmi Bai Self-Defense Training” is a scheme under the Samagra Shiksha Programme, implemented by the Secondary Education Department, Government of Uttarakhand. The scheme aims to provide free self-defense skills training (including judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) to girl students in upper primary and secondary schools across the state. BenefitsFree self-defense techniques training is provided to girl students. EligibilityThe applicant (girl student) must be studying in an upper primary or secondary government school in Uttarakhand. Application ProcessOfflineSelf-defense skills training (judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing) is provided to female students in upper primary and secondary schools across the state. All girls in each selected school are included in the training. Documents RequiredDocuments as required by the concerned school. Frequently Asked QuestionsWho is eligible to apply for this scheme? Girls studying in upper primary and secondary government schools in Uttarakhand are eligible. Is this training free of cost? Yes, the self-defense training is provided completely free of cost. Which skills are taught under this scheme? Training includes judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing. What is the target group of this scheme? The scheme targets girl students in government upper primary and secondary schools. Do all girls in selected schools get enrolled automatically? Yes, all girls in each selected government school are included in the training. Is the scheme applicable in private schools? No. Sources And References[Guidelines (Page No. 53)](https://uk.gov.in/department92/library_file/file-30-01-2025-04-25-16.pdf)OkWas this helpful?

faqs.question: Who is eligible to apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Girls studying in upper primary and secondary government schools in Uttarakhand are eligible.

faqs.question: Is this training free of cost?
faqs.answer: Yes, the self-defense training is provided completely free of cost.

faqs.question: Which skills are taught under this scheme?
faqs.answer: Training includes judo, karate, martial arts, and boxing.

faqs.question: What is the target group of this scheme?
faqs.answer: The scheme targets girl students in government upper primary and secondary schools.

faqs.question: Do all girls in selected schools get enrolled automatically?
faqs.answer: Yes, all girls in each selected government school are included in the training.

faqs.question: Is the scheme applicable in private schools?
